title: Matera CEO Ranked #7 in The Top 50 Financial Entrepreneurs of 2025
excerpt: In The Top 50 Financial Technology Entrepreneurs of 2025, Matera Co-founder and CEO, Carlos Netto, has been ranked #7 alongside other leading fintech innovators.
body:
In The Top 50 Financial Technology Entrepreneurs of 2025, Matera Co-founder and CEO, Carlos Netto, has been ranked #7—alongside other leading fintech innovators shaping the future of finance. This recognition reflects Carlos' visionary leadership, deep industry expertise, and tireless commitment to transforming the financial technology landscape.

Check out the full article on [Thegreatentrepreneurs.com](https://thegreatentrepreneurs.com/the-top-50-financial-technology-entrepreneurs-of-2025/).
